app.title: RescueMind AI
app.subtitle: Barangay Disaster & Complaint Triage
landing.title: Barangay Triage System
landing.subtitle: Sistema a pinapa-andar na AI para ed mabilis tan maong a pamag-ruta na saray disaster tan complaint reports ed makanepegan ya ahensya na gobyerno.
landing.featuresDesc: Didisenyo parad modernon barangay governance ya walay AI tan offline capability.
landing.categoriesDesc: Susuportan so amin a kabkabilang report na barangay.
landing.testimonialsDesc: Feedback manlapud saray gagamit mi ed masasaber a barangay.
landing.ctaDesc: Manrugalay pamag-report na insidente ed inyon barangay. Libre tan mainomay gamiten.
form.title: Mag-Report na Insidente
form.description: Ialagi so insidente o reklamo ed inyon barangay.
form.placeholder: Halimbawa: Malakas a baha diad kanto na Mabini St. tan Rizal Ave., angga tuhod so danum, kailangan na rescue.
form.error.minLength: Paki-iter so mas detalyadon alagi (andi-anggaan 10 karakter).
form.tip: Tip: Pinduten so Ctrl + Enter parad mabilis a pamosumiter.
form.locationFailed: Agtuklas so lokasyon. Mamili na manual ed baba.
loading.title: Sususien so report...
result.humanReview: Kailangan na manual review — mababa so lebel na kumpiyansa.
disclaimer.text: Sayan resulta et AI-assisted classification labat. Say final action tan routing et responsibilidad na barangay.
offline.title: Offline Mode
dashboard.title: Report Dashboard
dashboard.description: Sarita na amin a na-submit a report.
error.generic: Walay lapis na nagawa ed pamag-proseso na report. Paki-subukan lamang.
error.network: Walay koneksyon ed server. Paki-subukan lamang.
auth.passwordHint: Say password et andi-anggaan 6 a karakter
auth.successMsg: Ipapawid so confirmation link ed saray email. Paki-nengneng so inbox (tan spam folder).
auth.demoInfo: Demo: Mangawa mona account, kayari tan nengneng so email (o i-disable so email confirmation ed Supabase Dashboard).
auth.loginDescription: Mamahala na saray report na barangay
locale.label: Pangasinan
